import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut current: String = ""
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for y in sorted
    if not inserted and x < y
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, y)
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn build_intersection(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for x in a
    if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(result, x)
      result = insert_sorted(result, x)
    end
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)
let inter = build_intersection(a, b)

if list.len(inter) == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out: String = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in inter
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
